title: Retire on Hyperliquid with @luckyponds
summary_title: Lucky Ponds: lottery gaming on Hyperliquid with 7% fees flowing back to HyperFrogs holders
summary_description: Bernie built a daily, weekly, and monthly raffle app where players deposit 0.1+ HYPE for a chance to win the full pool. Revenue splits to frog holders.

key_moments.label: Host opens space, announces HyperFrogs and Lucky Ponds discussion
Zerk introduces Bernie, Cosmos dev pivoting to HyperVM and Hyperliquid
HyperFrogs: first ASCII collection on HyperEVM with fully on-chain JPEGs
Bernie explains what drew him to Hyperliquid: learning EVM, Solidity, first-mover advantage
Zerk names real reason: Cosmos broke, Hyperliquid has liquidity and degens willing to gamble
Lucky Ponds launches with 7% fee to HyperFrogs holders on every win
Game goes live after one hour; first week includes Trippy Wolf NFT rewards
Five-minute hyper mode explained: short PVP bursts, requires active simultaneous players

pull_quote: There's just more liquidity, more people, more fun on Hyperliquid right now. I mean, it's just the truth, right?
